description_long: This is a DeWalt 20V MAX cordless electric drill, featuring a robust, ergonomic design with a black and yellow color scheme. The drill has a pistol-grip handle with visible wear and scuff marks, indicating frequent use. The front section houses a metallic chuck with a hexagonal drill bit attached, and the body includes several ventilation slots for cooling. The base of the handle contains a removable battery pack, clearly labeled with the DeWalt branding and voltage information. The side of the drill displays detailed manufacturer labels and safety warnings. The overall construction appears to be a combination of durable plastic, metal, and rubberized grip surfaces.
description: A well-used DeWalt 20V MAX cordless electric drill with a black and yellow body, visible wear, and a hexagonal drill bit attached.
description_view_0: Side view showing the DeWalt branding, battery pack, and attached drill bit.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the handle's back, battery pack, and worn grip surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with manufacturer labels, ventilation slots, and battery details.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the metallic chuck, drill bit, and the front face of the handle.
